# sops_file (Resource)

Encrypts plaintext content to a SOPS-encrypted file on disk.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `content_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Plaintext content to encrypt. Write-only — never stored in state. Bump content_wo_version to trigger re-encryption.
- `content_wo_version` (String) Version token for content_wo. Changing this value triggers re-encryption of the file.
- `path` (String) Destination path for the encrypted file.

### Optional

- `age` (Block, Optional) Per-resource age key override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--age))
- `aws` (Block, Optional) Per-resource AWS KMS credential override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--aws))
- `azure` (Block, Optional) Per-resource Azure Key Vault credential override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--azure))
- `creation_rules` (Block, Optional) Master keys + content rules used when encrypting this file. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--creation_rules))
- `gcp` (Block, Optional) Per-resource GCP KMS credential override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--gcp))
- `input_type` (String) yaml, json, dotenv, ini, binary, or raw. Auto-detected from path extension when omitted.
- `pgp` (Block, Optional) Per-resource PGP / GnuPG override. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pgp))
- `rotate_keys` (Boolean) When true on Update, rotate master keys without re-encrypting plaintext.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Same as path. Used as the resource identity.
- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `plaintext_sha256` (String, Sensitive) SHA-256 of the decrypted plaintext. Used for out-of-band drift detection.
- `sops_last_modified` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of the last SOPS encryption.
- `sops_mac` (String, Sensitive) SOPS message authentication code from the encrypted file.

- `ssh_private_key_file` (String)
